definitions: n. 本质，精髓（＊ basic nature）
essence.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ess（存在）＋ence→存在的根本→本质，精髓
collocations: of the essence 非常重要的，不可缺少的
examples: This constant reshaping and recreation is the essence of folk music.这种不断的重塑和再创造是民间音乐的精髓。

definitions: a. 彩色蜡笔的；柔和的（bland, soft）n. 彩色蜡笔（画）
pastel.memory_aid: 词根记忆：past（生面团）＋el→用糊状物制作的粉笔→彩色蜡笔的
collocations: pastel shades 柔和的色彩
examples: Pastel colors are always restful to our eyes. 柔和色总能让我们的眼睛得到休息。

definitions: vt. 耕种；培养（bring up, foster）
cultivate.memory_aid: 词根记忆：cult（种植；培养）＋iv＋ate（动词后缀）→耕种；培养
examples: Expressive leaders cultivate a personal relationship with staff in the group. 富有表现力的领导能与小组成员建立一种私人关系。

definitions: v. 复原，恢复（renew）；重新获得；收回
recover.memory_aid: 联想记忆：re（再，又）＋cover（包括）→重新获得
examples: After taking some medicine, she has almost recovered from her cough.吃了些药后，她的咳嗽快好了。

definitions: n. 代替者，代替品（replacement）v. 代替（replace）
substitute.memory_aid: 词根记忆：sub（在…下面）＋stit（＝stat 站立）＋ute→站在下面→代替
examples: Radio is a substitute for newspapers in people's homes. 在人们家中，广播是报纸的一种替代品。

definitions: n. （欧洲14至16世纪的）文艺复兴，文艺复兴时期；复兴，再生（renewal, revival）
renaissance.memory_aid: 词根记忆：re（再，又）＋naiss（＝nasc 出生）＋ance→再生
examples: The Renaissance was more than a "rebirth". It was also an age of new discoveries, both geographical and intellectual. 文艺复兴不仅仅是一次“新生”，也是一个重新发现的时代，既包括地理上的新发现，又包括智力上的新发现。

definitions: n. 汗；一身汗 v.（使）出汗
sweat.memory_aid: 联想记忆：辛勤的汗水（sweat）过后是甜蜜的（sweet）果实
collocations: sweat gland 汗腺
examples: I woke up in a sweat. 我醒来时浑身是汗。

underscore.pronunciation: [ˌʌndərˈskɔːr] vt. 强调（stress, emphasize, underpin）；在…之下画线
definitions: n. 底线
underscore.memory_aid: 组合词：under（在…下面）＋score（画线）→在下面画线以示重要→强调
examples: These excesses underscore a feature of residential expansion related to the growth of mass transportation. 这些多出的部分强调了住宅扩展的特点，这一扩展与大规模运输的发展有关。

definitions: vi. 遵守，服从（comply）；符合（agree）；适应（adapt）
conform.memory_aid: 词根记忆：con（共同）＋form（形状）→形状相同→符合
examples: They should be designed to conform to the topography of the area. 它们的设计应该符合该地区的地貌。

definitions: n.（果类、谷物等的）外壳，外皮（shell, outer covering）vt. 去壳，削皮
examples: How can we remove the husk of the grains? 我们怎样去掉谷物的外皮？

definitions: v. 涨落 n. 潮，潮汐；潮流，趋势（trend）
tide.memory_aid: 联想记忆：潮（tide）起潮（tide）落，岁月（time）如歌
collocations: tide sb. over 帮助某人渡过难关
examples: Could I borrow a twenty to tide me over till payday next Thursday? 你能借我20块钱帮我渡过难关吗？下周四就发工资了。

definitions: n. 十年，十年期
decade.memory_aid: 词根记忆：deca（十）＋de→十年，十年期
examples: The last decade is a dream decade for the country's economic growth. 过去的十年是该国经济飞速发展的十年。

definitions: n. 多元化，多元性；多元主义
collocations: cultural pluralism 文化的多元性
examples: Don't pursue pluralism too much, or you will accomplish nothing instead. 不要过于强调多元性，否则你将一事无成。

definitions: n. 无业游民，流浪者 a. 漂泊的
vagrant.memory_aid: 词根记忆：vag（漫游）＋rant→无业游民，流浪者
examples: Sophie met a band of vagrants at the door of the coffee shop. 索菲在咖啡店门口遇到一群流浪汉。

incline.pronunciation: [ɪnˈklaɪn] v.（使）倾斜；（使）倾向于 [ˈɪnklaɪn] n. 斜坡，斜面（slope）
incline.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（向内）＋clin（倾斜）＋e→向内斜→（使）倾斜
examples: They have come back from their trip to Europe; they inclined to take a rest for a couple of days. 他们刚从欧洲旅行回来；这几天想休息一下。

Today, is the first day of the rest of my life, I wake as a child to see the world begin. On monarch wings and birthday wonderings, want to put on faces, walk in the wet and cold. And look forward to my growing old, to grow is to change, to change is to be new, to be new is to be young again, I barely remember when.
grievous.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（无）＋noc（伤害）＋ent→无害人之心的→天真的
collocations: stumble across/on/upon 意外发现，偶然遇见；stumble into无意间涉足
the political sphere 政界
at leisure 闲散，悠闲；leisure pursuits 休闲活动
as hard/tough as nails 像钉子一样硬，坚强；a nail in sb.'s/sth.'s coffin 导致失败的事物；nail down 将…固定；达成一致
in panic 惊慌；panic sb. into doing sth. 使某人仓促做某事
in a flash 转瞬间；flash by 一闪而过
a coral reef 珊瑚礁
a strong/broad accent 浓重的口音
due to 由于；due date 到期日，支付日
verbal agreement 口头协议
engage in (doing) sth. 从事于某事
examples: The report said that was a grievous waste. 报道称，那真是一种令人悲痛的浪费。
She was tall, slim, with fair skin and large saucy eyes. 她高个子，苗条，皮肤白皙，有一双漂亮的大眼睛。
Disproportionate emphasis on examinations may bring about serious consequences. 对考试的过分重视会造成严重的后果。
There are some parents who might withhold sweets from their children as a form of punishment. 有些父母会不给孩子糖果，以示惩罚。
Tom says it's nosy to ask others about their private lives. 汤姆说问及他人的私生活是爱管闲事的表现。
Be careful not to stumble against that table, or you'll break the glasses on it. 当心不要撞上那张桌子，否则会打翻上面的玻璃杯的。
That famous artist who was seen as the father of painting is full of imaginative ideas. 那位被奉为绘画之父的知名艺术家有着丰富的想象力。
Inherent complexity is the true cause of chaotic systems. 内在的复杂性是系统混乱的真正原因。// The traffic in the city is chaotic in the rush hour.在高峰时间，城市的交通混乱不堪。
Seldom has a city as New York gained such world renown. 很少有哪个城市能像纽约这样在世界上享有如此盛名。
Look at this; it's a Chinese vertical scroll painting. 来看看这个，这是一幅中国垂直式卷轴画。
Not everyone embraced the new population plan which was proposed by the President. 并非每个人都拥护总统提出的这个人口计划。// He held her in a warm embrace. 他热烈地拥抱着她。
The government official was eager to obliterate his mistake. 这名政府官员急于掩盖自己的过错。
This treaty ends the colonization of the two islands. 该条约结束了这两个岛屿的殖民化历史。
The next item on the agenda is to discuss the affiliating program. 会议议程的下一项是讨论联盟计划。
Ever since the family has been characterized by a rancorous bitterness. 从此，这个家庭充满了仇恨与痛苦。
It is obvious that foreign culture here belongs to a subculture. 很明显，外来文化在这里属于一种亚文化。
The on-line forum provides a platform for people to voice their opinions. 在线论坛为人们提供了一个表达自己观点的平台。
That black man was a leading participant in the movement to end slavery. 这位黑人是结束奴隶制运动的一位重要参与者。
These repayments are putting a strain on our finances. 偿还这些债务给我们的财务状况带来了压力。// You might strain your shoulder. 你可能会扭伤你的肩膀。
Orthoclases vary in color from white to pink to red. 正长石颜色不一，从白色到粉色再到红色都有。
The National Academy of Design mediated conflicts between artists. 国家设计研究院调解了艺术家们之间的冲突。
Ants can be extremely sensitive to these signals. 蚂蚁会对这些信号极其敏感。
The city will host the country's biggest flower exposition. 这个城市将主办国内最大的花博会。
This area was formerly within the sphere of French influence. 这一地区先前属于法国人的势力范围。
Are you in any pain or is there any discharge in your ears? 你感觉到痛吗？耳朵里有分泌物吗？// If too much volcanic heat is discharged, the crater's ice pack will melt away entirely. 如果释放出过多的火山热量，火山口的冰层就会完全融化。
A galaxy is a giant family of many millions of stars. 星系是由数百万颗恒星组成的一个大家族。
If clay contains too much iron it will melt when fired. 黏土中如果含有过多的铁就会在烧制过程中熔化。
Bill solicited my opinion. 比尔征求了我的意见。
She doesn't have much leisure. 她没有太多空闲时间。
Genetic engineering helps researchers unravel the mysteries of previously incurable diseases. 遗传工程帮助研究人员揭开此前那些不治之症的谜团。
She hammered the nail in. 她把钉子敲了进去。
Mango trees grow rapidly and can attain heights of up to 90 feet. 芒果树长得很快，高度可达90英尺。
Governments should be constituted by the will of the people. 政府应依人民的意志而设立。
There are numerous unsubstantiated reports. 有无数未经证实的报告。
In her versions the figures became more stylized and the landscapes less naturalistic. 在她的版本里，人物更加脸谱化，风景也不再那么写实。
Nellie gained a reputation as a daring, intrepid journalist. 内莉赢得了勇敢无畏的记者的美名。
Both political parties wanted Dwight D. Eisenhower as their presidential nominee. 两个政党都想让德怀特·D. 艾森豪威尔当他们的总统候选人。
The class presentation started half an hour ago and I was just beginning to panic. 半个小时前，课堂报告开始了，我就开始惊慌了起来。

Farmers relieved the burden of the daily routine with such relaxation as hunting. 农民以诸如狩猎等娱乐活动来缓解日常劳作的艰辛。// The fault was discovered during a routine check. 这个错误是在一次常规检查中发现的。
Attempts to find a solution have failed. 找到解决方法的种种努力均以失败告终。
The movement revered craft as a form of art. 这场运动把工艺尊为一种艺术。
This is how Thomas Jefferson idealized the farmers at the beginning of the 19th century. 这就是托马斯·杰斐逊在19世纪初如何把农民理想化的。
Flashes of light were followed by an explosion. 阵阵闪光之后就是一声爆炸的巨响。
This substance is secreted from cells in the intestinal walls. 这种物质是从肠壁的细胞中分泌出来的。
He and Dr. Johnson disagreed on basic economic issues. 他和约翰逊博士在基本的经济问题上无法达成共识。// No silver coins were issued until 1794. 直到1794年才发行银币。
An aria in music was originally any expressive melody, usually, performed by a singer. 在音乐中，咏叹调最初是指任何形式的抒情曲调，通常由一位歌唱家来表演。
Government's trade policies facilitated the exporting of agricultural products. 政府的贸易政策推动了农产品的出口。
The hydroelectric station began generating electricity in the mid-1980s. 该水电站于20世纪80年代中期开始发电。
Although based on feudal models, the colony of Pennsylvania developed a reputation for a progressive political and social outlook. 尽管基于封建模式，宾夕法尼亚殖民地却因进步的政治和社会观点而颇受好评。
The President's visit promoted the cooperation between the two countries. 总统的访问促进了两国间的合作。
The national government made a feeble attempt to make larger holdings available to homesteaders. 国民政府试图给自耕农更大的股份，但收效甚微。
The rapid growth of Boston during the mid-nineteenth century coincided with a large influx of European immigrants. 随着大量欧洲移民的涌入，波士顿在19世纪中期得到迅速发展。
The seas have been used as a receptacle for a range of industrial toxins. 海洋成了各种有毒工业废料的容器。
Anyone with a foreign accent, even a child, was discriminated against in the district. 有外国口音的人，哪怕是孩子，在这个地区都会受到歧视。
Squirrels bite through the shells to get at the nutritious kernels. 松鼠咬开果壳，吃里面营养丰富的果仁。
Agriculture made possible a more stable and secure life. 农业使更加稳定且更有保障的生活成为可能。// The girl secured herself a place at business school. 那个女孩在商学院获得了一席之地。
Social atomization affected every segment of society. 社会分化影响了社会的各个部分。
The rain nourished the crops. 雨水滋养了庄稼。
The movie star was engulfed by a crowd of his fans. 那个电影明星被他的粉丝团团围住。
Honesty is the bedrock of any healthy relationship. 诚实是建立一切良好关系的基础。
I can't remember the due date for our final paper. 我不记得论文的截止日期了。
These innovations in manufacturing boosted output and living standards to an unprecedented extent. 这些生产创新把产量和生活标准提高到了前所未有的程度。
When you sneeze, you expel air from your lungs. 打喷嚏时会排出肺部的空气。

If you can't meet a deadline for an essay, you should go and see your lecturers. 如果不能按时提交论文，就应该去找你们的导师（说明情况）。
I won't tolerate your foolish behavior anymore. 我再也无法容忍你愚蠢的行为了。
The identity of the author is unknown. 这名作者的身份不为人所知。// The hardness of the mineral often gives a clue to its identity. 矿物的硬度常常是了解其特性的线索。
Some parts of this country are dry because rainwater seeps quickly through sandy soils and into the rock below. 该国的一些地区非常干燥，因为雨水很快渗过砂土，进入下面的岩石层。

The man was found innocent of any crime. 该男子获判无罪。// It was a perfectly innocent remark. 那只不过是一句毫无冒犯之意的话。

n. 事务律师，诉状律师

definitions: a. 内部的（inner）；内地的 n. 内部； 内陆（inland）
interior.memory_aid: 词根记忆：inter（在…之间）＋ior→内部的
collocations: interior design 室内设计；in the interior of 在…内部
examples: If a volcano erupts, some of the Earth's interior heat escapes to the surface. 如果火山喷发，地球内部的一些热量就会逃逸到地表。

definitions: n. 宪法，章程；体质；构成
constitution.memory_aid: 词根记忆：con＋stit（站立）＋ution→国无法不立→宪法
examples: The student studied the genetic constitution of cells hard. 这个学生努力学习细胞的基因构成。

definitions: v.（使）结冰，（使）凝固
collocations: freeze over 冰封；freeze up （机器、引擎等中的水）结冰
examples: Jack caught a fish and dropped it beside him on the ice and it froze solid. 杰克捉到一条鱼，将其随手扔在身旁的冰上，结果鱼冻得硬邦邦的。// I was really happy to be writing a detective story. But after the first few pages, I sort of froze up mentally. 我很高兴能写侦探小说。但是只写了几页，我的脑子就不转了。

definitions: v.（使）脱水（dry, desiccate）
dehydrate.memory_aid: 词根记忆：de（分离）＋hydr（水）＋ate（使…）→（使）脱水
examples: The little girl's body had dehydrated dangerously with the high temperature. 那个小姑娘的体温很高，严重脱水。

definitions: a. 蜿蜒的（winding）；迂回的
sinuous.memory_aid: 词根记忆：sinu（曲线）＋ous→弯曲的→蜿蜒的
examples: They walked along the sinuous course of the river. 他们沿着弯弯曲曲的河道散步。

definitions: n. 闹钟；警报（alert）vt. 使惊恐（startle）；使担心
alarm.memory_aid: 联想记忆：al＋arm（武器）→用武器来惊吓→使惊恐
collocations: a burglar alarm 防盗警报；alarm call 叫醒电话；告警声
examples: She never wakes up before her alarm goes off. 闹钟不响她就醒不来。// Ecologists would probably be alarmed by the scientists' findings. 科学家们的发现可能会让生态学家们感到惊恐。

definitions: n. 〈总称〉机器，机械（machines in general）；机构（organization）
examples: The use of farm machinery continued to increase. 农机工具的使用在继续增加。

definitions: v. 预期，期望，指望（anticipate）
examples: I wonder where the books I ordered are. I expected to receive the package several days ago. 我不知道我订购的书到哪里了。我本来指望几天前收到包裹的。// Economists expect the global economy to drop by 2％ this year. 经济学家预期今年全球经济将下降2％。

definitions: v. 预见，预期（＊ look forward to, foresee, expect）；先于…行动
anticipate.memory_aid: 词根记忆：anti（在…之前）＋cip（拿，取）＋ate→预先取得→预见
examples: The test was much harder than he had anticipated. 测验比他预期的要难得多。

definitions: n. 评论家，批评家；吹毛求疵者（detractor）
critic.memory_aid: 词根记忆：crit（判断）＋ic→作出判断→评论家，批评家
collocations: a music critic 乐评人
examples: The coal industry has been targeted by critics as a significant contributor to the greenhouse effect. 煤炭业被评论家指责为是造成温室效应的罪魁祸首。

definitions: a. 本能的
examples: We must completely understand and be aware of its instinctual behavior. 我们必须充分理解并意识到它的本能行为。

definitions: a. 神秘的（weird）；易乎寻常的（unusual）
uncanny.memory_aid: 联想记忆：un（不）＋can（能）＋ny→不能理解的→异乎寻常的
examples: The magician says it doesn't end here, and the uncanny part is yet to come. 魔术师说，魔术到此并未结束，神秘的还在后头。

definitions: n./vt. 逮捕，拘留；停止，阻止；吸引
arrest.memory_aid: 联想记忆：ar（表加强）＋rest（休息）→让人休息→拘留；停止
examples: The suspect was put under arrest by the police. 嫌疑犯被警察逮捕了。

definitions: v. 撒，洒，喷 n. 少量
sprinkle.memory_aid: 联想记忆：sprin（看做spring，春天）＋kle→春天的阳光洒在身上很舒服→洒
examples: Sprinkle some pepper on the dish when it's done. 菜出锅后，在上面撒点胡椒粉。

definitions: a. 传统的；正统的
orthodox.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ortho（正）＋dox（观点）→正统观点的→正统的
examples: The orthodox Thanksgiving dinner must have turkey and pumpkin pie. 传统的感恩节晚餐必须有火鸡和南瓜派。

examples: The boy is being a real pest. 那个小男孩真是讨厌。

definitions: n. 天才（talent）；天赋（endowment）
genius.memory_aid: 词根记忆：gen（出生）＋ius→天生具有的才能→天赋
examples: They insisted that The Iliad and The Odyssey could have been the work of a single poetic genius. 他们坚持认为《伊利亚特》和《奥德赛》是一位天才诗人的作品。

definitions: v.（被）称为，认为（consider）n. 名声，名誉（reputation）
repute.memory_aid: 词根记忆：re（再，又）＋put（想）＋e→反复想→认为
examples: The hotel was reputed to be the best in the country. 这家酒店据说是该国最好的。// My father is a writer of international repute. 我父亲是一位享有国际声誉的作家。

definitions: n. 动物群
fauna.memory_aid: 来自Faunus（潘纳斯，罗马神话中的动物之神）
examples: The region's rich fauna attracts frequent visits of large vertebrates, such as whale sharks and dolphins. 该地区丰富的动物群吸引鲸鲨、海豚等大型脊椎动物经常来访。

definitions: a. 有益健康的
examples: The old man lived to 84 years old with little illness, largely due to his healthful living habits. 那个老人活到84高龄，而且少病痛，很大程度上要归功于其健康的生活习惯。

definitions: a. 感应的，交感的；有同情心的；体谅的
sympathetic.memory_aid: 词根记忆：sym（共同）＋path（感觉）＋et＋ic→有着共同感觉的→感应的
collocations: sympathetic vibration 共振
examples: He is sympathetic and understanding. 他富有同情心，善解人意。

definitions: n. 死亡率
mortality.memory_aid: 词根记忆：mort（死亡）＋al＋ity（表性质，名词后缀）→死亡率
examples: Mortality from lung cancer is still increasing. 死于肺癌的人数仍在增长。

definitions: v.（＝want to）想要
examples: Hey, Larry. Wanna meet a few of us for coffee in a little while? 你好，拉里。一会儿想和我们几个喝点咖啡吗？

definitions: n. 前辈（＊ antecedent）；前任；（被取代的）原有事物
predecessor.memory_aid: 词根记忆：pre（在…前面）＋de＋cess（走）＋or（表人，名词后缀）→走在前面的人→前辈
examples: The eighteenth century houses showed great interior improvements over their predecessors. 18世纪的房屋内部改进很大，胜过之前的房屋。

definitions: v. 擦洗；取消（计划等）n. 灌木丛（shrub）；丛林地带
scrub.memory_aid: 联想记忆：走过灌木丛（scrub），腿上被擦破（rub）好几处
examples: Mom is scrubbing the floor in the kitchen. 妈妈正在厨房里擦地板。

definitions: a. 深不可测的；极坏的，糟透的

definitions: a. 安静的，平静的
tranquil.memory_aid: 词根记忆：tran（＝trans 表加强）＋qui（安静，平和）＋l→完全安静、平和的→安静的，平静的

definitions: n. 突然行动 v. 猛扑；突然袭击

definitions: v. 沉淀（settle）；堆积（accumulate）；储蓄；寄存 n. 沉积物，堆积物；存款
deposit.memory_aid: 词根记忆：de（向下）＋pos（放）＋it→向下放→沉淀；堆积
examples: The sediments have been deposited over a comparable period of time. 沉淀物经过相当长的一段时间堆积了起来。// The deposits associated with present-day glaciers have been well studied. 对与当今冰河相关的沉淀物的研究已经很深入了。

definitions: n. 团圆，重聚
reunion.memory_aid: 联想记忆：re（重新）＋union（联合）→重新联合在一起→团圆，重聚
examples: Next Monday, we will have a family reunion. 下周一我们有个家庭聚会。

definitions: v. 产（卵）；放置；铺；筹划，设置；提出，提交
examples: Turtles travel miles through the sea to lay eggs on an island. 为去岛上产卵，海龟在海里游数英里远。// They laid the injured woman down on the grass. 他们把受伤的女人平放在草地上。

definitions: vt. 占用；占据，占领（take up）；使忙于（做某事）
occupy.memory_aid: 联想记忆：发生（occur）大事了，敌人占领（occupy）了该市
examples: Wish I'd brought a book or something to occupy my time. 我真该带本书或一些别的东西来打发时间。

definitions: vt. 包围（＊ surround, encircle）
examples: More dense atmosphere gradually enveloped Earth. 更多浓厚的大气逐渐笼罩了地球。

definitions: n. 库房（warehouse）；贮藏；存储
collocations: storage space 储藏室；storage shed 仓库；storage battery 蓄电池
examples: Some fungi can grow at 500℃, while others can grow at -5℃, so even food in cold storage may not be completely safe from them. 有些真菌能在500摄氏度的温度下生长，有些能在零下5摄氏度下生长，所以甚至冷藏的食品都不能完全免于真菌。

definitions: a. 积极主动的；先发制人的
proactive.memory_aid: 联想记忆：pro（在…前面）＋active（活动的）→预先活动的→积极主动的
collocations: proactive computing 预发式计算
examples: My role is to help you take a more proactive approach to your life. 我的职责是帮助你对你的生活采取更加积极主动的态度。

definitions: n. 想象，幻想（imagination, illusion）

examples: Science fiction is a mixture of science and fantasy. 科幻小说融合了科学和幻想。

definitions: vt. 安排（arrange）；假定（assume, postulate）
posit.memory_aid: 联想记忆：po＋sit（坐）→坐下来→安排
examples: Most religions posit the existence of life after death. 大多数宗教都假定人死后生命仍存在。

definitions: vt./n. 掩饰（mask）；伪装，假装（pretend）
disguise.memory_aid: 联想记忆：dis（分离）＋guise（外表）→使看不到真实的外表→掩饰；伪装
examples: These songs' origins cannot be disguised and therefore they belong primarily to the composer. 这些歌曲的起源不能被掩盖，它们主要属于这位作曲家。

definitions: n. 心理学；心理，心理特征（mentality）
psychology.memory_aid: 词根记忆：psycho（灵魂，精神）＋logy（…学）→心理学

Every day I remind myself that my inner and outer life are based on the labors of other men, living and dead, and that I must exert myself in order to give in the same measure as I have received and am still receiving.
每天我都提醒着自己：我的精神生活和物质生活都是以别人的劳动为基础的，我必须尽力以同样的分量来报偿我所获得的和至今仍在接受着的东西。

examples: My friends lent me money. Otherwise, I couldn't have afforded the trip. 朋友们借钱给我了，否则我可付不起这次旅费。//
We are making slow but steady progress. 我们前进的步伐虽然缓慢，但却是在稳步前进。
The accomplishments of women are ignored in most historical documents. 大多数历史文献都忽略女性的成就。
Life originated in the early seas less than a billion years after the Earth was formed. 地球形成之后不到十亿年，生命就形成于早期的海洋中。
The banyan tree has aerial roots. 榕树有气根。
Lipids are organic molecules that are insoluble in water. 类脂是不溶于水的有机分子。
The school believes in interactive teaching methods. 这所学校相信互动教学法。
I don't have the charisma to attract so many people. 我没有这么大的魅力，能吸引这么多人。
This conversation is joyous and affable. 这次谈话既愉快又友善。
The things I'm about to say may disconcert others but not you. 我要说的事可能会让别人不安，但你不会。
Many players form an organization, and induct other players to join in. 一群玩家组成一个组织并吸纳别的玩家加入。
He hammered the wedge into the crack in the stone. 他用锤子把楔子砸入石缝里。
Our team lacks cohesive force, and that's why we lost the game. 我们队缺乏凝聚力，这就是为什么我们输掉了比赛。
He was charged with rape. 他被控犯了强奸罪。
The alarm clock is the only animate thing in this quiet room. 闹钟是这个安静的房间里唯一有生气的东西。
The band's summer tour will culminate at a fabulous concert in New York. 这个乐队将在纽约举行精彩绝伦的演唱会，为夏季巡回演出画上句号。
One of the explanations is defense from predation. 其中一个解释是对被捕食的防范。
Repeat the last procedure and add another coat of gloss. 重复上述步骤，再上一层亮光漆。
The city adjoins a well-known small-goods market. 那个城市毗邻全国闻名的小商品城。
It was time for the sheep to be shorn. 是剪羊毛的时节了。
The football team's victory was regarded as a major triumph. 足球队的胜利被认为是一个巨大的成功。
I query whether his word can be trusted or not. 我怀疑他的话是否可信。
People nowadays are incredulous about ghosts. 人们现在都不相信有鬼怪了。
Mary was anything but puritanical in her behavior. 玛丽的行为根本不守道德。
Susan received an anonymous letter. 苏珊收到了一封匿名信。
The blockbuster is mainly about a savage, bitter battle. 这部大片主要讲了一场残酷、激烈的战斗。
I'd like a glass of cider. 我想要一杯苹果汁。
They lived in a converted barn. 他们住在由谷仓改建的房子里。
Her hair has been badly cut and the ends are uneven. 她的头发剪得很槽，发端参差不齐。
It took the young tiger some time to awake to the dangers of its situation. 过了一会儿那只小老虎才意识到处境危险。
To my surprise, even though now Mary is rich, she is still stingy. 出乎我的意料，现在玛丽虽然有钱了，却还是那么吝啬。

The bargain Frank got on his new stereo made him very happy. 弗兰克买的新音响很划算，他很高兴。// I've done what I promised and I expect you to keep your side of the bargain. 我已经履约，希望你也能遵守协议。// In the market dealers were bargaining with growers over the price of tea. 在市场上经销商们正和茶农就茶叶的价格进行商谈。
The circulation of weekly magazines exceeded that of newspapers in that period. 在那个时期，周刊的发行量超过了报纸。
Try to anticipate what your child will do and forestall problems. 尽量预见你的孩子会干什么，并预先阻止问题发生。
A concave lens has two focal points—one on each side. 凹透镜有两个焦点，每面各有一个。
Bill acknowledged his failure to complete the job. 比尔承认了未能完成工作。// I acknowledged Tom for all of his help with the project. 我对汤姆为这个项目提供的所有帮助表示了感谢。
Anne made many boasts about her business. 安妮大肆夸耀自己的生意。
Professor Burke will distribute calendars to the students. 伯克教授将日历分发给学生。
voter turnout is a fundamental quality of fair elections and is generally considered to be a necessary factor for a healthy democracy. 投票人数是公平选举的基本特征，其被广泛认为是健康民主的必备因素。
I guess they wanted to reinforce the stuff we learned in school about history. 我猜他们想巩固我们在学校学过的历史知识。
The rate of species extinction in these environments jolted us into action. 这些环境里的物种灭绝率使我们猛然醒悟而行动起来。// The eel can produce a strong jolt of electricity to stun its prey. 鳗鱼可以产生一股强烈的电流来击昏猎物。
Particles spiral back and forth between the Earth's magnetic poles. 粒子在地球磁极之间来回盘旋。
The cost has also made such plants less attractive from a purely economic perspective. 纯粹从经济角度考虑，其成本也使这种作物不那么有吸引力。
The kids were all wearing animal masks. 孩子们都戴着动物面具。// The professor masked his anger with a smile. 教授用微笑来掩饰愤怒。
The weather, which had hitherto been sunny and mild, suddenly turned cold. 迄今为止还是晴朗温暖的天气忽然就变冷了。
He has been studying a comet for more than 20 years. 他已研究彗星长达20余年。
The fascination of sociology lies in the fact that it makes us see in a new light the very world in which we have lived all our lives. 社会学的引人入胜之处在于它让我们从一个新的角度来观察我们一辈子都生活于其间的这个世界。
Previously the poor quality of the iron had restricted its use in architecture to items such as vaults and walls. 以前铁的质量不好，限制了其自身在建筑中的拱顶和墙壁等方面的使用。
Since the developing of scientific technology, there has been a great improvement in energy efficiency at the factory. 科学技术的发展让工厂的能源利用率得到了大幅提高。
He mimed and copied all her actions. 他模仿她的一举一动。
Scientists can identify the living age of some species by studying stratigraphy. 科学家们可以通过研究岩石组成来确定一些物种的生存年代。
This research has done much to advance our understanding of language learning. 这项研究大大提高了我们对语言学习的认识。
One of these migrating swarms was estimated to contain 124 billion locusts. 据估计，这些迁徙的蝗虫中的一批有1240亿只。
The danger of the fire gave an impetus to the use of more durable material. 火灾的危险推动了耐火力更好的材料的使用。
Some of the representatives hadn't planned to attend the international conference. 一些代表没打算参加这次国际会议。
The problem with solar energy is that it works only when the sun is shining. 太阳能的问题在于其只在阳光照耀下才工作。
The beaver's penchant for building lodges and canals has got it into a lot of hot water lately. 最近，海狸搭巢和筑坝的嗜好使其陷入了困境。
I prefer non-fiction: history, social commentary and stuff like that. 我喜欢纪实性读物：历史、社会评论等诸如此类。
His work is to instruct newcomers about bicycle maintenance. 他的工作是指导新来者如何维修自行车。
They launched a program to protect the gorilla. 他们启动了大猩猩保护项目。
The apartment's room arrangement was not logical. 公寓房间的格局不合理。
The researchers remove eggs from the nests of parrots and incubate them under laboratory conditions. 研究人员从鹦鹉巢里取走鸟蛋，并在实验室环境下将其孵化。
The dog is an absolute monster! 那条狗好大啊！
The urban life seemed particularly intriguing to those raised in rural isolation. 对在农村偏远地区长大的人来说，城市生活似乎特别有吸引力。
Stratigraphy is the description of strata in sedimentary rock. 地层学描述了沉积岩层。
They participated in the last three races. 他们参加了最后三项比赛。
Giant pandas resemble bears in shape. 大熊猫和熊在体形上相似。
The mason worked hard but earned little. 那个泥瓦匠工作很辛苦，赚得却很少。
Nationalism unites people of different classes and ideologies. 国家主义将来自不同阶级、具有不同意识形态的人联系在了一起。
The heading should be catching. 标题必须引人入胜。
Their major discovery illustrated how unpredictable consequences could come from rather modest beginnings. 他们的重要发现表明了看似极其平常的初始是如何产生了预想不到的结果的。
The beggar's main preoccupation at this time is getting some money and food. 乞讨者此时满脑子想着的是弄到一些钱和食物。

examples: His paintings depict the communal cultural experience of Mexican descended people in the US. 他的绘画描写了在美墨西哥后裔的社区文化体验。

definitions: a. 易碎的（brittle）；脆弱的（delicate, frail）；纤巧的；虚弱的
fragile.memory_aid: 词根记忆：frag（打碎）＋ile→容易被打碎的→易碎的
examples: His muscle fibers were short and fragile. 他的肌肉纤维短而脆弱。// The old woman is now 90 and in fragile health. 那个老妇人现已90高龄，身体虚弱。

definitions: a. 敏捷的，灵活的（nimble, brisk）
agile.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ag（做）＋ile（能…的）→做事灵活的→敏捷的
collocations: an agile brain 灵活的头脑
examples: The leader of a country needs an agile mind to solve sophisticated problems. 国家领导人需要敏捷的头脑来解决复杂的问题。

definitions: n. 能力，胜任；权限；技能
examples: By the age of three the babies will be well on their way to communicative competence. 孩子们到了三岁时就能很好地进行交流了。

definitions: n. 生菜；莴苣
examples: Please buy a lettuce and some tomatoes for me. 请帮我买一棵生菜和一些西红柿。

definitions: a. 空的（empty）；闲置的（unused）；（神情等）茫然的，（心灵）空虚的
vacant.memory_aid: 词根记忆：vac（空）＋ant（形容词后缀）→空的
examples: There are still vacant rooms. 现在仍有空房间。

definitions: vt. 分配（distribute, allot）；分派
apportion.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ap＋portion（部分）→分成部分→分配
examples: The man's property was apportioned among his children after his death. 那个男人过世后，财产为其子女所分。

definitions: a. 感情（上）的，情绪（上）的；引起情感的；易动感情的

examples: The successful prevention of juvenile delinquency requires efforts on the part of the entire society. 要想成功预防青少年犯罪，需要整个社会共同努力。

examples: A woman's status was changed by marriage. 女人的地位因婚姻而发生改变。

definitions: vt. 促进（boost, advance）；提升；宣传，推销（advertise）

examples: In the early decades of the United States, the agrarian movement promoted the farmer as society's hero. 美国建国初几十年里，农业运动把农民提升为社会的英雄。

examples: Recently, universities have become involved with students' emotional lives and their academic lives. 最近，大学已开始关注学生的情感生活和学术活动。

examples: Everyone has to understand the utmost rigor of the law. 每个人都必须理解法律至高无上的严格性。

complex.memory_aid: 词根记忆：com（共同）＋plex（重叠）→重叠交叉的→错综的

definitions: n. X射线，X光；X光照片
examples: The doctor studied the X-rays of her lungs. 医生研究了她肺部的X光照片。

appeal court 上诉法院；take appeal to/against 对…提出上诉
biological diversity 生物差异；species diversity 物种多样性
an astute politician 机敏的政治家；an astute investor 精明的投资者
an act of terrorism 恐怖主义行动
hold in contempt 轻视，对…不屑一顾
in vain 白费力气；be vain of/about 为…自负
take advantage of 利用；to advantage 有利，使优点突出
in/out of commission 可／不可使用
at any rate 无论如何，至少；at the rate of 以…速度
saturation point 饱和点，极限
examples: The feudal system lasted for more than two thousand years in China. 封建制度在中国持续了两千多年。
During the Neolithic period, some hunters and gatherers began to rely chiefly on agriculture for their sustenance. 在新石器时代，一些猎人和采集者开始主要依靠农业来维生。
Children tend to be influenced by their parents' behaviors and habits. 孩子们往往会受到父母的行为和习惯的影响。
We use charcoal to grill the steaks. 我们用木炭烤牛排。
There are several levels, dotted with kiosks and fountains, which offer varied prospects of San Francisco Bay. 这里有好多楼层，其间星罗棋布地点缀着大大小小的亭子和喷泉。在那里可以欣赏旧金山湾的各种风光。

It's so thoughtful of you to offer to drop me off at the train station. 你真体贴人，要把我送到火车站。// Thank you for your kind offer of help. 谢谢你的好心帮助。// They've decided to accept our original offer. 他们已决定接受我们最初的报价。
Mars takes longer to revolve on its axis than the Earth. 火星自转一周的时间比地球的长。
Certain feminists showed a keen sense of history by keeping records of activities in which women were engaged. 一些女权主义者通过坚持记录女性参与的各项活动展示出了敏锐的历史感。
In the modern world, fingerprinting as a means of identification has been widely used in many fields. 在当代社会，指纹作为一种身份鉴定手段广泛应用于很多领域。
She bought some audio equipment. 她购买了一些音频设备。
Caterpillars are voracious feeders and many of them are considered pests in agriculture. 毛毛虫很贪婪，在农业上许多毛毛虫都被视为害虫。
Think twice before doing anything rash. 切忌草率行事。
This modern wildlife art appeals to large numbers of nature lovers. 这一现代野生动物艺术吸引着大量热爱自然的人。
Water precipitates many chemical compounds and is constantly modifying the face of the Earth. 水使很多化合物沉淀，并不断改变着地球的表面。
The author argues that there is more diversity of life in the sea than in the rain forests. 作者辩称，海洋里的生物比雨林里的更加多样化。
He needed to look up some words in the dictionary in order to comprehend the novel. 他需要用字典查一些词才能理解这部小说。
The old couple lived in a small house built of timber. 那对老夫妇住在一间小木屋里。
It is astute to sell out the stocks just before prices go down. 股价下跌之前清仓是明智的。
Textile mills turn to wool for blankets and uniforms. 纺织厂需要用羊毛来做毯子和制服。
The most distant luminous objects seen by telescopes are very far. 通过望远镜看到的最远的发光体离我们非常遥远。
The news spread in homes, workshops and taverns. 这个消息传遍了家家户户、车间和小酒馆。
It will be hard to conciliate the views of labor and management regarding health benefits. 要调和劳资双方在健康福利政策方面的观点并不容易。
He is a devout Christian. 他是一名虔诚的基督徒。
Kids walk with a rolling gait. 小孩走起路来摇摇摆摆的。
The tyrant gouged the dissenter's eyes out. 那个暴君挖出了他的反对者的双眼。
I must be candid with you that this plan will not work out. 我必须坦白告诉你，这个计划无法实施。
Terrorism is a serious concern by many countries around the world now. 目前恐怖主义是一个备受全球很多国家关注的严重问题。
Her personal ambitions had been subjugated to the needs of her family. 她个人的雄心壮志让位给了家庭的需要。
We pushed our way through the throng. 我们挤过人群。// People are thronging to see her new play. 人们成群结队去看她的新戏。
Many states have outlawed corporeal punishment in schools. 许多州宣布在学校里进行体罚是非法的。
The invasive surgery made me feel fearful. 开刀手术让我感到恐惧。
We seem to be straying from the main theme of the debate. 我们似乎偏离了辩论的主题。
The only practicable way is to ask her for help. 唯一可行的方法是向她求助。
He was impressed by the architecture's modernity. 这个建筑的现代性给他留下了深刻的印象。
Mary speaks in contempt of the others. 玛丽以轻蔑的口吻谈论他人。
The word has two possible antonyms. 这个单词可能有两个反义词。
She can't afford to pay her tuition. 她负担不起学费。
It's so emergent that you have to help me. 事情太紧急了，你得帮帮我。
The housing price has gone up in an outrageous way. 房价涨得太离谱了。
After hearing what he said, I tried to keep back my tears, but in vain. 听到他那么说，我怎么也忍不住我的眼泪。
Many men think that is an advantage for being a woman. 许多男人认为那就是作为女人的一种优势。
Excellent communication skill is one of the decisive factors in work. 出色的沟通能力是工作中的决定因素之一。
The corona is not always evenly distributed across the surface of the Sun. 日冕并不总是平均分布于太阳表面。
What I neglected to mention was the controversy around Peary's pioneering accomplishment. 我忘记提皮尔里开创性成就所带来的争议了。
Deciduous trees shed their leaves in autumn. 落叶木在秋天落叶。
Stoneware used to be simple, utilitarian kitchenware. 粗陶器过去是简单实用的厨房用品。// By our narrow standards, scrub doesn't meet our selfish utilitarian needs. 根据我们狭隘的标准，灌木丛不能满足我们自私的功利性需求。
Most photographic filters work by subtracting portions of visible light from the subject. 大多数摄影滤光器的作用是把部分可见光从摄影对象中滤掉。
A perceptive scholar questioned the professor's theory. 一位有洞察力的学者质疑这个教授的理论。
Artists are taking the distinction between public and private spaces into account when executing their public commissions. 艺术家在执行公众委任的事务时，会考虑到公共场合与私人空间的区别。
In fact important breakthroughs in the field of astronomy can come from students' work. 事实上，天文学领域的很多重要突破都可能来自学生们的工作。
His stories are inspired by his travels. 他写小说的灵感来自他的游历。
Tool use may indicate that animals have some cognition. 对工具的使用或许表明动物具有一定的认知能力。
Penicillin is still one of the most widely used antibiotic agents. 青霉素仍是最为广泛使用的抗生素之一。
Ethnology is a branch of anthropology that deals with how various cultures developed. 民族学是人类学的一个分支，研究各种文化的发展历程。
How often is a volcano likely to erupt? 火山可能多长时间爆发一次？
He is considered the greatest cellist of his time. 他被认为是他所处时代最伟大的大提琴家。
Students should avoid a lack of uniformity in evidence when writing their papers. 学生在写论文时应该避免论据不一致。
We are not fully informed about the developments. 我们不完全清楚进展情况。
Freight trains have an accident rate that is only 1/3 that of the trucking industry. 货运火车的事故率只是卡车的三分之一。//
The paper is underneath the book. 论文在书下面。
She maneuvered her way to the top of the company. 她施展手腕使自己进入了公司最高领导层。
Journalism is a fulfilling career that combines the excitement of covering the news with the satisfaction of a life of public service. 新闻工作是一个令人感觉充实的职业，既能感受到报道新闻时的刺激兴奋，又能收获为公众服务所带来的满足感。
The Moon may be divided into two major terrains. 月球也许可分为两种主要地形。
The society's activities also included organized sketching excursions along the Hudson River. 这个社团的活动也包括沿着哈德逊河进行的有组织的写生远足活动。
The company was beset by price wars and market saturation. 那家公司深受价格战和市场饱和的困扰。
Feldspar is the most abundant mineral on the Earth's surface. 长石是地球表面最丰富的矿物质。
We rehearse only one night a week. 我们一周只排练一晚上。
Many prehistoric people subsisted as hunters and gatherers. 很多史前人类靠狩猎和采集维生。
Cascara is added to many popular natural weight-loss supplements. 缓泻剂被添加于许多广受欢迎的自然减肥药中。

derivatives.pos_def: a. 吸引人的；打动人心的
a. 使人振奋的，鼓舞人心的
n. 排练，排演；复述，重复

related.pos_def: n. 拉小提琴的人，小提琴家

definitions: vt. 胶合，黏合（cement）；紧附于（attach）n. 胶，胶水（gumwater）
glue.memory_aid: 联想记忆：警方终于从一瓶蓝色（blue）胶水（glue）中找到了线索（clue）
examples: Her eyes were glued to the screen. 她目不转睛地盯着屏幕。

definitions: n. 通货膨胀，物价上涨；（充气而引起的）膨胀
examples: The governments in some countries have taken measures to control the inflation rate. 一些国家的政府已经采取了措施来控制通货膨胀率。

definitions: n. 证书，证明书；文凭，结业证书
certificate.memory_aid: 词根记忆：cert（确认）＋(i)fic（做）＋ate→确认有做某事的资格→证书
examples: The Birth Certificate is issued by the provincial or territorial government and is required as identification to apply for other important personal documents. 出生证明由省或地区政府开具，在申请其他重要的个人文件时必须出具出生证明。

definitions: n.（山等的）最高点，峰顶，极点（peak）；峰会
examples: Scientists need to put a special receiver on the summit to receive signals from the satellites. 科学家们需要在山顶放置一个特殊的接收器来接收卫星发出的信号。

definitions: n. 核，核子，原子核；细胞核；核心（core）
examples: At the core of every ice crystal is a minuscule nucleus. 每个冰晶体的核心是一个极小的核子。

definitions: n. 属性，特征（＊ characteristic, trait）
examples: John has many good attributes that make him eligible for the job. 约翰有很多优点，这使得他能胜任这份工作。// Jane attributed her lateness to the heavy traffic. 简把迟到归咎于交通拥挤。

definitions: a. 行星的
collocations: planetary motions 行星运动；a planetary system 行星系
examples: Many planetary orbits are not circles. 很多行星轨道都不是圆形的。

definitions: v. 将（物品）系牢，捆绑（fasten）；（风、雨等）猛烈打击；鞭打；猛烈抨击，严厉斥责 n. 鞭打；睫毛
lash.memory_aid: 联想记忆：l＋ash（灰）→对敌人的鞭打似有挫骨扬灰之势→猛烈打击
examples: There are other drums that have skins lashed onto both sides. 有的鼓两面都绑有皮面。// Freak rainstorms once lashed in the central and southern sections of the state. 不寻常的暴风雨曾在这个州的中南部肆虐。

definitions: a. 易损的（fragile）；微妙的（subtle）；精巧的（exquisite）；娇弱的，纤细的
examples: The tiny, delicate skeletons are usually destroyed by weathering before they can be fossilized. 小的易碎骨骼通常在能变成化石之前就已经风化了。

definitions: a. 熟练的，精通的（skilled, expert）
proficient.memory_aid: 词根记忆：pro（在…前面）＋fic（做）＋ient→提前做了，更熟练→熟练的，精通的
examples: The scrolls were written in a language that is really rare today. Only a few people are proficient at it. 卷轴上的语言现在非常罕见，只有很少的人精通于此。

definitions: n. 保留剧目（repertoire）；保留剧目轮演；库存，储备；仓库
examples: The repertory of a concert band includes marches, and other forms of music. 管乐团的保留曲目包括进行曲和其他形式的音乐。

definitions: a. 巨大的，极大的（＊ remarkable, massive）
enormous.memory_aid: 联想记忆：e（出）＋norm（规范）＋ous（形容词后缀）→超出常规的→巨大的
examples: The problems facing the manager are enormous. 经理面临的问题是巨大的。

definitions: vt. 统一，联合（unite）
unify.memory_aid: 词根记忆：uni（单一）＋fy（动词后缀）→统一
examples: The area was economically unified. 这个地区在经济上实现了统一。

definitions: n. 缓解，减轻，轻松；援救，救济；宽慰；浮雕（法或作品）
examples: We should have some relief by the end of the week. 这个周末我们应该轻松一下。// Molds are used to create particular effects for some products, such as relief-decorated vessels and figurines. 模子用来为一些产品制造特殊效果，例如有浮雕装饰的器皿和小雕像。

definitions: a. 欺骗性的，导致误解的（fraudulent）
examples: Its simplicity of appearance is deceptive. 它简单的外表具有欺骗性。

n. 脊椎动物 a. 有脊椎的

n.（诗）节，段（verse）
You have to believe in yourself. That's the secret of success.
人必须相信自己，这是成功的秘诀。
miracle.memory_aid: 词根记忆：burg（＝bud 花蕾）＋eon→像花蕾一样成长→迅速成长
collocations: work/perform miracle 创造奇迹；有奇效
spontaneous generation 自然发生；spontaneous combustion 自燃
Greek tragedy 希腊悲剧
the outbreak of war 战争爆发
from the cradle to the grave 一生，从生到死
curriculum committee 课程编制委员会；advisory committee 咨询委员会
an exalted position 显赫的地位
nicotine patch 尼古丁贴剂
abnormal behavior 变态行为
emission control 排放控制
vertebrate animals 脊椎动物
in/within range of 在可及的范围内；range from 延伸；（在一定范围内）变化
stiff paste 浓膏；a stiff wind 强风
successive generation 连续世代
alternate between...and... 在…与…间交替
examples: It's a miracle that nobody was hurt in the traffic accident. 这次交通事故中无一人受伤，真是个奇迹。
These ponderous machines reaped the grain, threshed it, and bagged it, all in one simultaneous operation. 这些笨重的机器收割谷子，脱粒，然后打包，所有这些都在同一个操作流程里完成。
The war was paradigm of the destructive side of human nature. 那场战争尽显人性中具有破坏性的一面。
The insect is active at night and rests motionless amid foliage during the day. 这种昆虫夜间活跃，白天却在树叶间一动不动地休息。
The audience burst into spontaneous applause. 观众自发地鼓起掌来。
The police lost their quarry in the crowd. 警察在人群中找不到他们要追捕的人了。
The musical arrangement was normally improvised in the greatest hurry. 乐曲通常都是在极其匆忙的情况下即席创作出来的。
It's a tragedy that the famous writer died so young. 那位著名作家如此英年早逝真是一大惨事。
With the outbreak of natural disaster, there has been a massive epidemic sweeping over the region. 随着自然灾害的爆发，一场大规模的流行病横扫了这个地区。
Inflation has reached a plateau. 通货膨胀停了下来。
The engine that became standard on Western steamboats was of a novel design. 成为西方蒸汽船标准的引擎拥有一个新颖的设计。
The rest of the organism has decayed. 生物体的其余部分已经腐烂。// The San Antonio project was designed to combat urban decay. 圣安东尼奥项目旨在防止城市衰落。
They will explore every avenue until they find an answer. 他们会探索一切途径，直到找到答案为止。
A medicine may lose its potency if you keep it too long. 药物存放太久，可能会失去效力。
The club has received benevolent donations nationwide. 俱乐部收到了来自全国的慈善捐款。
A causal ceremony will be held to mark this occasion. 为了纪念这个日子，我们将举行一个典礼。

ad. 自然地，自发地；情不自禁地

definitions: n. 牛仔，牧牛工
examples: He rides a horse like a cowhand. 他像个牛仔那样骑着马。

definitions: n. 航天器，宇宙飞船
spacecraft.memory_aid: 组合词：space（太空）＋craft（技术）→太空技术造出的机器→宇宙飞船
collocations: a manned spacecraft 载人宇宙飞船
examples: Spacecraft are used for a variety of purposes, including communications, earth observation, planetary exploration, etc. 宇宙飞船用途广泛，可用于通信、地球观测、行星探测等。

definitions: vt. 厌恶，嫌恶（detest, loathe）
disgust.memory_aid: 词根记忆：dis（不）＋gust（味道）→不喜欢这个味道→厌恶
examples: The raw fish disgusted me, so I left the table. 生鱼让我感到恶心，所以我离开了餐桌。

definitions: n. 学问学识；传说，传统
lore.memory_aid: 联想记忆：好学（lore）的人难以抵挡书的诱惑（lure）
examples: She lived alone in the forest, relying on her knowledge of herb lore to survive. 她独自一人住在森林里，靠自己的草药知识生存了下来。

definitions: a. 细心的，小心翼翼的（＊ careful）
meticulous.memory_aid: 词根记忆：metic（害怕）＋ul＋ous（多…的）→非常害怕的→细心的
examples: George is a meticulous man. 乔治是个细心的人。

definitions: n. 破晓，黎明；开始，发端（outset）
examples: They arrived in Paris as dawn broke. 他们在黎明时分到达巴黎。// Peace marked a new dawn in the country's history. 和平使这个国家的历史翻开了新的一页。

definitions: v.（使）出现伤痕；挫伤 n. 伤痕，擦痕，青肿
bruise.memory_aid: 发音记忆：“不如死”→对她来说，脸上有伤痕还不如死→伤痕
examples: It looks like you've just bruised the bone on your foot. 你好像伤到脚骨头了。

definitions: v. 邻接，毗邻（adjoin, border on）
abut.memory_aid: 联想记忆：a（无）＋but（但是）→没有转折→不需要绕弯就能直接到达→邻接，毗邻
collocations: abut against 紧靠；abut on 接连，邻接
examples: His land abuts onto a road. 他的土地紧靠公路。

definitions: n. 调味品（dressing, flavoring）
condiment.memory_aid: 词根记忆：con（一起）＋di（放）＋ment（名词后缀）→放在一起→调味品
examples: This kind of substance is recognized as a very precious condiment and food preservative. 这种物质被认为是非常珍贵的调味品和食物防腐剂。

definitions: vt. 使泄气，使灰心；阻止，劝阻
discourage.memory_aid: 词根记忆：dis（不）＋cour（精神）＋age→使没有精神→使泄气
examples: This rule is likely to discourage people from buying cars. 这个规定很可能会阻止人们购买汽车。

definitions: vi. 闪烁，闪耀 n. 灿烂的光辉；诱惑力，魅力
glitter.memory_aid: 联想记忆：g＋litter（看做little，小的）→一闪一闪小星星→闪烁
examples: An old saying goes like this: all that glitters is not gold. 俗话说得好，闪闪发光的不一定都是金子。

definitions: a. 愤慨的，恼怒的
indignant.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（不）＋dign（价值）＋ant→不值得的→愤慨的
examples: I'm indignant over the treatment I received at this restaurant. 我对自己在这家饭馆所受到的待遇感到愤慨。

definitions: n. 融合，合并；联合，结合
examples: The new company was formed by the amalgamation of two small businesses. 这家新公司是由两个小企业合并而成的。

definitions: a. 折磨人的，令人痛苦的；曲折的，蜿蜒的；含混不清的，拐弯抹角的
tortuous.memory_aid: 词根记忆：tort（扭曲）＋u＋ous（形容词后缀）→令人身心扭曲的→折磨人的
examples: As the saying goes: while the road ahead is tortuous, the future is bright. 俗话说得好，道路是曲折的，前途是光明的。

definitions: a. 显著的，值得注目的
examples: The sales in the past year has seen no noteworthy growth. 过去一年，销售量没有显著的增长。

There wasn't enough evidence to bring the case to the court. 没有足够的证据可以把此案提交法庭。// As a politician he has often courted controversy. 作为政治人物，他常常招致非议。
Hundreds of police in riot gear were on the scene immediately. 数百名身带防爆装备的警察立刻赶到了现场。// She witnessed some very distressing scenes. 她目睹过一些令人非常痛苦的场面。
The campus bus runs at really inconvenient time. 校园巴士运行的时间真是不方便。
It's been my passion since I collected my first Lincoln dime in 1971. 自从我1971年收藏第一枚林肯十分钱硬币以来，这就成了我的嗜好。
After a week together on a field trip, it is obvious that the partners are totally incompatible. 共同进行野外考察一周后（发现）同组伙伴们之间完全合不来。

She did not want to expose her fears and insecurity to anyone. 她不想向任何人显露她的恐惧与不安。// A group of mice was placed in a brightly lit open box with no hiding places. Some of the mice wandered around the box and didn't appear to be bothered about being so exposed. 一群老鼠被放在了照亮的无盖的盒子里，里面没有躲藏的地方。有些老鼠在盒子里转来转去，好像并不介意暴露在灯光之下。
There are two more days to register for the class. 注册这门课的时间还有两天。
The cost of construction and the very high risk deterred private investment in this town. 建筑成本和高风险使私人不敢在这个镇上投资。
Most manufacturing occurred in relatively small plants. 大多数生产活动在相对较小的工厂里进行。
He works in a private enterprise. 他在一家私人企业工作。
Unprecedented change in the nation's economy would bring social chaos. 这个国家前所未有的经济变化将导致社会动乱。
The American Revolution was not a sudden and violent overturning of the political and social framework. 美国革命不是以暴力的方式突然推翻政治和社会框架的。
In a small community, behavioral norms are more likely to be homogeneous than in a large city. 在小社区，行为规范可能比在大城市更趋于统一。
The neighbors had a long-standing disagreement over the boundary. 邻居们就分界线存在着长期的分歧。
All the attackers were male, aged between 25 and 30. 所有的攻击者都是男性，年龄在25到30岁之间。
I've made an appointment to see my dentist. 我和我的牙医约好了。
The children screamed with delight on the exhilarating carnival ride. 在令人兴奋的狂欢旅程上，孩子们开心地喊叫着。

We'll see many artistic works depicting the major events of her life. 我们将看到描写她一生主要事件的许多艺术作品。
Their keen senses of hearing and smell have made some types of dogs valuable in hunting and tracking and as security guards. 某些种类的狗因听觉和嗅觉灵敏而在狩猎、追踪和保卫方面很有价值。
This event marks the beginning of the modern era of seismology. 这一事件标志着地震学研究新时代的开始。
The company's welfare officer deals with employees' personal problems. 公司负责福利的工作人员负责处理雇员的个人问题。
The company grossed 4 million. 该公司获得了400万美元毛利。

He stood on the edge of the cliff. 他站在悬崖边。// The company needs to improve its competitive edge. 该公司必须提高其竞争力。// I have to give a presentation in class this afternoon, and I am a little on edge. 我下午要在班上做个报告，感觉有点紧张。
A glacier can revert to a fluffy mass. 冰川能够重新变回蓬松的一团。
The appliances in the kitchen are all made of stainless steel. 厨房用具都是不锈钢做的。
Our team won the game by a slender margin. 我们队以微弱的优势赢得了比赛。
The result is an increased concentration of noxious chemicals in the air. 结果是空气中有毒化学品的浓度增加。
It's an exhibition of wildlife art calendar from about a hundred years ago. 这是一个关于大约100年前的野生动物艺术日历的展览。
We are quizzed on our views about education. 我们被征询对教育的看法。
The universe is filled with puzzling materials. 宇宙中充满了令人不解的物质。
We find Bob agreeable most of the time. 我们发现鲍勃大部分时间都比较随和。// They were most agreeable on the subject of voting rights. 他们非常愿意谈论选举权这个话题。
The bank granted her a loan to cover her school expenses. 银行为她提供贷款来支付上学费用。// Mary seems surprised that she got a research grant. 玛丽对得到研究经费好像很惊讶。
All the statues along the road seem perfectly designed for the grand religious perception the local people often had there. 路旁所有的雕像似乎完全是为迎合当地人拥有的宏大宗教观念而设计的。
He began to question the ethics of his position. 他开始对他的立场是否符合道德准则提出了质疑。
Maglev will not actually ride on the tracks but will fly above tracks that are magnetically activated. 磁悬浮火车实际上并不在轨道上行驶，而是漂浮在磁力驱动的轨道上快速行驶。
The extinction of the dinosaurs was caused by some physical event, either climatic or cosmic. 恐龙灭绝是由某个气候或宇宙的物理事件造成的。
Her novels are anchored in everyday experience. 她的小说取材自日常生活经验。
The bridge is a triumph of modern engineering. 这座桥是现代工程的一大成就。// Could you give me a ride to the engineering building? 你能开车送我去工程系大楼吗？
None of the passengers and crew were injured in the accident. 在这次事故中，没有一名乘客和工作人员受伤。
He delayed telling her the truth, waiting for the right moment. 他没有马上把真相告诉她，而是在等待合适的时机。// Report it to the police without delay. 赶快将此事报告给警方。
Work has to come to a halt when the machine goes wrong. 机器出故障时必须停止工作。
Rubber became the staple of the Malayan economy. 橡胶成了马来西亚经济的支柱产记。// In southern China the staple crop is rice. 在中国南部，水稻是主要农作物。
The quartz crystal in a heater vibrates at a particular frequency. 加热器中的水晶振子按照某个特定频率振动。

The invention of the steam engine acted as a stimulus to industrial development. 蒸汽机的发明促进了工业发展。
The bird flaps one wing in an apparent attempt to take to the air. 这只鸟扇动着一只翅膀，明显是想飞起来。
The flowers emit a fragrant odor. 花朵散发出芳香。
Thousands of mine disposal sites scarred the coal-rich regions. 成千上万的矿井处理场破坏了煤含量丰富的地区的景观。
The captain keeps a log. 那位船长记航海日志。// The police log all phone calls. 警方对所有电话都做记录。
She was stirred by his sad story. 她被他悲惨的故事打动了。// Would you please give the tea a stir? 请把茶搅一搅好吗？
She never referred to her daughter again. 她再也没有提起过她女儿。// You may refer to your notes if you want. 如果需要，可以查阅笔记。
I have a real enthusiasm for the work. 我的确热衷于这项工作。

definitions: vt. 使失事；破坏（destroy）n. 船；失事
examples: The scandal wrecked the politician's chances of being elected. 丑闻使这个政客失去了当选的可能。

definitions: vt. 焚化，焚毁（cremate）
incinerate.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in＋ciner（灰）＋ate（使…）→使成灰→焚化，焚毁
examples: The waste is incinerated in a large furnace. 垃圾在一个巨大的炉子里焚化。

definitions: n. 范围，界限（＊ extent, range）；眼界，见识；（发挥能力等的）余地，机会
scope.memory_aid: 联想记忆：事情处理（cope）得多了，眼界（scope）自然就会开阔起来
examples: This issue is outside the scope of the article. 这个问题不在本文的论述范围之内。// Our powers are limited in scope. 我们的权限不大。

definitions: vi. 侵入，闯入；打扰，侵扰
intrude.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（进入）＋trud（刺）＋e→刺入→闯入
examples: The sound of the telephone intruded into his dreams. 电话铃声把他从梦中惊醒了。

definitions: n. 青铜；青铜色；青铜制品；铜牌 a. 青铜色的
collocations: Bronze Age 青铜器时代
examples: She won a bronze in skiing. 她在滑雪中获得了一块铜牌。

topsoil.memory_aid: 组合词：top（顶上的）＋soil（土地）→表层土
examples: The fieldstones remain in a frozen layer of topsoil. 大卵石仍然在表层的冻土里。

definitions: vt. 使认识（inform）；使熟悉（familiarize）
examples: She's well acquainted with the subject. 她对这个主题非常熟悉。

definitions: v. 烘，烤，焙
examples: The cake was over baked. 蛋糕烤过头了。

definitions: v. 浸没，淹没（immerge）
submerge.memory_aid: 词根记忆：sub（在…下面）＋merg（浸没）＋e→被吞没下去→浸没，淹没
examples: The rest of the peninsula was submerged. 剩下的半岛被水淹没了。

definitions: n. 徽章（badge）；标记，象征

examples: The dove is an emblem of peace. 鸽子是和平的象征。

definitions: n. 品种 v. 饲养（raise）；繁殖（reproduce）；养育；酿成，导致
breed.memory_aid: 联想记忆：专用面包（bread）来饲养（breed）动物，成本真够高的啊
examples: Our dog is a rare breed. 我们的狗是稀有品种。// The songbirds have finished breeding. 鸣禽完成了繁殖。

examples: My father gave me some very sound advice. 我父亲给了我一些非常合理的建议。

definitions: a. 怀有恶意的，恶毒的
examples: That girl's reputation was ruined by the malicious gossip. 那个女孩的名誉被恶毒的流言给毁了。

They are specially coded. 它们是经过特别编码的。

He was scornful of anyone who disagreed with his political beliefs. 他看不起所有与他持不同政见的人。

They did unearth the bones of a 45-foot-long dinosaur. 他们的确挖掘出了有着45英尺长的恐龙的骨骼。

She could not hide her amusement at the way he was dancing. 她看见他跳舞的姿势，忍俊不禁。
She's studying pharmacy at the university. 她在大学里学药剂学。
The beautifully preserved fossil fish lived in a vast shallow lake. 保存得完好的化石鱼曾生活在一片广阔的浅水湖中。

Astronomers use sighting telescopes to study the motions of many of the faint stars. 天文学家使用瞄准望远镜来研究很多暗星的运动。

Some of the baskets have been placed on permanent display at the Philadelphia museum of art. 在费城艺术博物馆，一些篮子已经成为永久性的展览品。

Her artwork is displayed in a museum. 她的艺术品正在博物馆展出。// Birds also display remarkable behavior in collecting building materials. 鸟类在搜集筑巢材料方面也表现出了不同寻常的行为。
They do their best to refine their interviewing techniques. 他们尽全力完善自己的采访技巧。
The company changed its cumbersome title to something easier to remember. 这家公司把它那复杂累赘的名称改得好记一些了。

A glacier maintains the same shape throughout the glacial process. 冰川在整个冰河期都保持同样的形状。

They want to beat the speed record. 他们想打破这一速度记录。// The music had a steady beat that people could dance to. 音乐有稳定的节奏，人们可以随之起舞。// We were just beat after raking all the leaves. 我们用耙子耙完所有树叶后都累坏了。

definitions: a. 系统的，体系的（methodic）
examples: While Edison's approach to invention was often cut-and-try, it was highly systematic. 虽然爱迪生用于发明的方法经常是试验性的，但这个方法却极具系统性。

derivatives.pos_def: vt. 使系统化，使制度化

definitions: n. 委托人，当事人；顾客（customer）
examples: Social workers must always consider the best interests of their clients. 社会工作者必须时刻考虑其当事人的最佳利益。

definitions: n. 颜料，染料 v. 染色
dye.memory_aid: 联想记忆：劣质染料（dye）会致人死亡（die）
examples: I want to dye my hair blonde. 我想把头发染成金黄色。

definitions: n. 龟，海龟
turtle.memory_aid: 发音记忆：“特逗”→龟（turtle）的样子特逗→龟

definitions: vt. 给…提供资金（＊ subsidize）n. 财政，金融；［常pl.］财务情况
finance.memory_aid: 词根记忆：fin（最后）＋ance→最后起作用的东西→财政，金融
examples: The troupe is financed by the elders. 剧团由老年人提供资金。

definitions: vt. 监督（oversee）；指导
supervise.memory_aid: 词根记忆：super（在…上面）＋vis（看）＋e→在上面看→监督
examples: The National Academy of Design for the painters supervised the incorporation of new artistic techniques. 为画家而开设的国家设计研究院指导新艺术技巧的融合。

definitions: n. 关税（tax, duty）；（旅馆、饭店等的）价目表，收费表
examples: The regulations keep tariffs high. 这些规定使关税一直居高不下。

definitions: a. 丰富的，富饶的
copious.memory_aid: 联想记忆：copi（看做copy，复制）＋ous→能不断复制的→丰富的
examples: Scientists support the theory of relativity with copious evidence. 科学家们用大量证据支持相对论。

definitions: n. 暴露显露；揭露；曝光；面临，遭受（危险或不快）
exposure.memory_aid: 来自expose（vt. 暴露，显露；揭露；使面临，使遭受）
examples: Vaccines for some rare diseases are given only to persons who risk exposure to the diseases. 某些罕见疾病的疫苗只供有可能接触这些疾病的人使用。

definitions: n. 物质；主旨，实质（matter）；根据；重要性（significance）
substance.memory_aid: 词根记忆：sub（在…下面）＋st（站）＋ance→站在下面的东西→实质
examples: The Moon isn't much like the Earth in terms of substance. 从物质方面来看，月亮不太像地球。// Nothing of any substance was achieved in the meeting. 会议没有取得任何实质性成果。

definitions: a. 新古典主义的
examples: The neoclassical sculptors seldom held a mallet or chisel in their own hands. 新古典主义雕塑家很少亲自手持槌棒或凿子。

definitions: n. 一系列（series）；阵列 vt. 布置，排列；部署
array.memory_aid: 联想记忆：ar＋ray（光线）→像光线一样→一系列
examples: Glasses of all shapes and sizes were arrayed on the shelves. 架子上整齐地排列着大大小小各式各样的玻璃杯。

definitions: n.（尤指针对私人问题的）顾问（advisor）；律师
examples: She worked as a marriage guidance counselor. 她是一名婚姻指导顾问。

definitions: vt. 同意，许可；惩罚，实施制裁 n. 同意，许可；约束；制裁
sanction.memory_aid: 词根记忆：sanct（神圣的）＋ion→神圣之物，原指教会的法令，后引申为“同意，许可”→同意，许可
collocations: sanction against 制裁，处罚
examples: Based on previous experience, the government will not sanction such a bill. 根据之前的经验，政府不会批准这种法案的。

definitions: vt. 提高（＊ increase, improve）；增强（enrich）
enhance.memory_aid: 词根记忆：en（使…）＋hanc（高的）＋e→提高；增强
collocations: enhance one's reputation 提高声誉
examples: Many poets enhance their work by creating a contrast between realism and symbolism in a given poem. 很多诗人通过在一首诗中制造现实主义与象征主义间的反差，来提升他们的作品。

Mary was adamant that she would not come. 玛丽坚决不来。
Such behavior will discredit you among your boss and colleagues. 这样的行为会让你在老板和同事面前丧失名誉。
The police went to the morgue and examined the body, but they didn't find anything suspicious. 警察去停尸房检查了死尸，但是没有发现任何可疑之处。
We always stick to the principles of democracy and serve the public. 我们向来坚持民主的原则并服务于大众。

The ornaments on the Christmas tree shined and sparkled. 圣诞树上的装饰品闪闪发光。
Even if they didn't put him in jail, they would possibly deport him. 即使他们不把他关起来，也很可能把他驱逐出境。
They lived a chaste life. 他们过着简朴的生活。

definitions: n. 无数（innumerability）；大量（multitude）a. 无数的（numerous）；大量的（＊ many）
myriad.memory_aid: 词根记忆：myria（许多的）＋d→无数；大量
examples: A snowfall consists of myriads of minute ice crystals. 雪是由无数细小的冰晶体构成的。// In all its myriad forms, glass represents a major achievement in the history of technological developments. 玻璃有着多种形态，是技术发展史上的一项重大成就。

definitions: n. 分派，分摊，分配
apportionment.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ap＋portion（部分）＋ment→分成部分→分派，分摊
examples: The apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives is based on the population of each state. 众议院的席位是根据各州的人口分配的。

definitions: n. 增加；增量；定期的加薪
increment.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（在…里面）＋cre（生长）＋ment→在里面增长→增加；增量
examples: It is estimated that the annual increment will be achieved by 20% in the following years. 预计今后每年将以20％的年增长率逐年增加。

definitions: v.（使）变僵硬；（使）变坚定，变强硬
stiffen.memory_aid: 联想记忆：stiff（硬的，僵硬的）＋en→（使）变僵硬
examples: The threat of punishment has only stiffened their resolve. 惩罚的威胁愈发坚定了他们的决心。

definitions: v.（使）突出，伸出
protrude.memory_aid: 词根记忆：pro（向前）＋trud（伸出）＋e→向前伸出→（使）突出，伸出
examples: He hung his coat on a nail protruding from the wall. 他把上衣挂在突出墙面的一根钉子上。

definitions: n. 旁听；试演（rehearsal）
examples: You won't need a text for the audition. 旁听不需要课本。

definitions: n. 性别歧视
examples: Her works focus on the subjects of sexism and racism. 她的作品关注性别歧视和种族歧视这样的话题。

definitions: a. 注意的，专心的；关心的
attentive.memory_aid: 词根记忆：at（一再）＋tent（伸展）＋ive→一再伸长脖子听→注意的，专心的
examples: This is the last French class this year, so I want to be attentive to what the teacher says. 这是今年最后一堂法语课，所以我要专心听讲。

definitions: v.（牛、羊等）吃草；放牧；擦伤（皮肤等）n. 擦伤（处）
graze.memory_aid: 联想记忆：牧童注视着（gaze）牛羊吃草（graze）
examples: There is a vast land suitable for livestock to wander and graze on. 那有一片广阔的土地，适合放牧牲畜。

definitions: a. 短暂的，转瞬即逝的；临时的
transient.memory_aid: 词根记忆：trans（穿过）＋ient→时光穿梭→短暂的
examples: Motels mainly cater to tourists and other transient guests. 汽车旅馆主要接待旅游者和其他临时的客人。

definitions: n. 极度痛（torment）v.（使）极度痛苦（torment）
anguish.memory_aid: 词根记忆：angu（痛苦）＋ish→极度痛苦
examples: The injured soldier cried in anguish until the doctor gave him an anesthetic. 这名受伤的士兵痛苦地哭泣，直到医生给他打了麻醉剂为止。

definitions: vt. 解放，解除
emancipate.memory_aid: 词根记忆：e（外）＋man（手）＋cip（抓）＋ate→抓着他人的手往外→解放
examples: This new machine will emancipate workers from doing all the work by hand they used to do. 这种新机器将会把工人们从过去的手工劳动中解放出来。

definitions: vt. 浪费，挥霍（时间、金钱等）
squander.memory_aid: 联想记忆：squand（看做squad，军队）＋er→军队杜绝浪费→浪费
examples: Donˈt squander your time and money in reading those science fictions. 不要把你的时间和金钱浪费在看那些科幻小说上。

definitions: v. 哀求，恳求（supplicate）
implore.memory_aid: 词根记忆：im（表加强）＋plor（流泪）＋e→伤心地流泪→哀求
examples: We implore the international community to interfere in this incident. 我们呼吁国际社会干预这一事件。

definitions: a. 贤明的；审慎的 n. 智者，圣人
sage.memory_aid: 联想记忆：s＋age（年龄）→智慧需要一年年的积累→智者，圣人
examples: I am extremely grateful for your sage advice. 我非常感谢你贤明的忠告。

definitions: n. 合作，协作

definitions: n.（建筑物或岩石的）突出部分；暗礁

definitions: vt. 分析，研究

examples: Experts analyze spider webs using a computer program. 专家们用电脑程序分析蜘蛛网。

definitions: a. 足够的，充分的（＊ adequate）
examples: It takes only 10 to 20 minutes of exposure to sunlight a day to ensure sufficient Vitamin D production. 每天只需10到20分钟的日晒就能确保产生足够的维生素D。

definitions: v. 做窝，筑巢 n. 巢，窝
examples: As many of you probably know, south beach is an important nesting site for the green turtle. 你们中很多人可能都知道，南海滩是绿海龟一个重要的筑窝地。

definitions: n.（尤指大宗的）收入（income）；税收

definitions: vt. 遣散；使复员

definitions: n. 登记（人数），注册（人数）；入学

B：这个趋势已经持续好几年了。

definitions: a. 不规则的，无规律的；不整齐的；不合常规的

derivatives.pos_def: n. 不规则性，无规律性；不合常规的行为

definitions: n. 青春（期）（youthhood）
adolescence.memory_aid: 联想记忆：ado（看做adult，成年人）＋lescence（看做licence，许可证）→青少年即将拿到成年的许可证→青春（期）
examples: Adolescence is the life stage that bridges childhood and adulthood. 青春期是从儿童到成人的人生过渡阶段。

definitions: n. 雪花，雪片
snowflake.memory_aid: 组合词：snow（雪）＋flake（薄片）→雪花，雪片
examples: Snowflakes come in a variety of sizes and shapes. 雪片大小不一，形状多变。

definitions: vt. 旁听；审计
examples: If you audit a course, you don't have to take the tests. 如果你仅是旁听，就不需要参加考试。

definitions: n. 评分；等级（rank）
grading.memory_aid: 词根记忆：grad（步，级）＋ing→评分；等级
examples: He doesn't know if Dr. Wilson has finished the grading of the midterm exams. 他不知道威尔逊博士是否已经批改完期中考试的试卷。

definitions: n. 除外，例外
collocations: without exception 无例外地；with the exception of 除…之外
examples: We've now discussed how most snakes move, but there are some notable exceptions. 我们已经讨论了大多数蛇是如何移动的，但是有一些例外情况值得注意。

definitions: n. 壳，外壳（crust）；壳状物；骨架，框架；外表；炮弹 vt. 给…去壳；炮击
shell.memory_aid: 联想记忆：坏蛋被一炮弹（shell）轰进地狱（hell）
examples: The house was now a shell gutted by flames. 房子被火烧得只剩个空骨架了。

definitions: vt. 阻碍，抑制（＊ hinder）
inhibit.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（不）＋hib（拥有）＋it→使不能拥有→阻碍，抑制
examples: They may discipline group members who inhibit attainment of the group's goals. 他们可以处罚那些阻碍实现团队目标的成员。

definitions: v. 争论，辩论（debate）；主张，论证；说服，劝说
argue.memory_aid: 发音记忆：“阿Q”→阿Q喜欢和人争论→争论
examples: Idealists argue that the representatives needed to control a series of problems in order for the United States to survive. 理想主义者认为，代表们需要对一系列问题进行调控以使美国渡过难关。

derivatives.pos_def: n. 争论，辩论；论据，论点

definitions: a. 市政的；内政的；地方性的（local）

examples: The municipal government ordered landlords to roll back their rents to the levels charged in 1978. 市政府下令让房东们把房租降到1978年的收取水平。

definitions: n. 布局，格局；结构，构造，形状（structure, shape）；配置
examples: The awkward configuration of the kitchen is very inefficient. 厨房的布局别扭，很不实用。

definitions: n. 草地，草坪（grassplot）；操场

examples: In summer we have to mow the lawn twice a week. 夏天我们每周得修剪草坪两次。

definitions: a. 根本的（fundamental）；激进的，极端的（drastic）；全新的，不同凡响的 n. 激进分子；游离基，自由基
collocations: free radical 自由基，游离基
examples: Cities had undergone radical social change. 城市经历了根本性的社会变革。

definitions: v.（使）枯萎，凋谢（fade, perish）；衰退（decline）；萎缩；破灭

examples: Some of the elm's leaves have withered and turned yellow. 一些榆树叶已经枯萎变黄了。

definitions: n. 海岸，海滨（coast, beach, shore）

definitions: a. 流行的，普遍的（＊ common, universal）

examples: Colds are particularly prevalent in winter in this area. 在该地区，感冒在冬天尤其流行。

definitions: vt. 把…排除在外

definitions: a. 痛苦的（tearing）；可怜的（wretched）；令人不快的

definitions: n. 代数

definitions: n. 放映机，幻灯机，投影仪

B: There's a spare in the storeroom.
A：这台投影仪出问题了，我做报告要用。
B：仓库有一台备用的。
examples: Projectors have been widely used in class in developed countries. 在发达国家，投影仪已在课堂上得到广泛使用。//

definitions: n. 环境，条件（environment）；境况，（尤指）经济状况（condition, situation）
circumstance.memory_aid: 词根记忆：circum（周围）＋st（站立）＋ance→存在于周围的→环境

definitions: a. 有效的，有效率的（effective）；有能力的，能胜任的

examples: Comparing the new car to a moderately fuel-efficient conventional car, it can go 400～700km on a tank of gas. 把这辆新车与燃油效率适中的传统车相比，它用一箱油就能跑400-700公里。

definitions: v. 复制（duplicate）；再制，再生

The bank manager changed the date of the initial interview. 银行经理变更了第一轮面试的日期。
You are not the only pebble on the beach. 你并非必不可少的人。
The hot air is devoid of even the slightest amount of moisture. 热空气中没有一点水汽。

derivatives.pos_def: vt. 使人性化，使人格化
ad. 就本人而言；亲自；个别地
n. 鸟兽等的交配，交尾
n. 多才多艺；多功能性

related.pos_def: a. 单调乏味的，沉闷的

definitions: vi. 缓行，漫步（stroll, wander）
examples: We ambled down to the beach. 我们漫步向海滩走去。

definitions: v. 削尖，磨快；使敏锐；（使）变得清晰
sharpen.memory_aid: 联想记忆：sharp（锋利的）＋en（使…）→使锋利的→削尖，磨快
examples: I haven't gotten around to sharpening the knife yet. 我一直没空磨那把刀。// The outline of the trees sharpened as it grew lighter. 随着天色转亮，树的轮廓变得清晰了。

definitions: n. 休眠；催眠状态；隐匿
dormancy.memory_aid: 词根记忆：dorm（睡眠）＋ancy→休眠；催眠状态
examples: That huge volcano erupted after twenty years of dormancy. 那座巨大的火山在休眠了20年后再次爆发。

definitions: v. 促进，力劝（impel）；驱赶，驱策 n. 强烈的欲望，冲动
examples: Do you think we should urge Bob to study Spanish? 你觉得我们应该劝鲍勃学习西班牙语吗？

derivatives.pos_def: a. 紧急的，迫切的；催促的

definitions: a. 可行的，可实施的（feasible）；可生长发育的
viable.memory_aid: 词根记忆：vi（道路）＋able（能…的）→有路的→可行的
examples: Bessemer's process for converting iron into steel made the material more commercially viable. 贝西默把铁转化成钢的方法使这种原料在商业上更为可行。

definitions: a. 平淡的，乏味的；清淡的；沉稳的
bland.memory_aid: 发音记忆：“布蓝的”→布是清淡的蓝色→清淡的；注意不要和blend（n./v. 混合）相混
examples: This pizza tastes bland. There is not enough sauce. 这个比萨饼吃起来没味道，调味汁不够。

definitions: v. 贡献，捐赠（donate）；有助于（＊ promote）；投稿（submit articles to）
contribute.memory_aid: 词根记忆：con（完全）＋tribut（给予）＋e→完全给予→贡献，捐赠
examples: I believe the social elements contributed to the development of bebop music. 我认为社会因素促进了比博普爵士音乐的发展。// She often contributes to the fashionable journal. 她经常给时尚杂志投稿。

definitions: n.（书籍、电影等的）三部剧，三部曲
examples: He was best known for his trilogy "Jiliu", which was written between 1931 and 1940, and included three semi-autobiographical novels. 他因“激流”三部曲而最富盛名，这个三部曲写于1931-1940年间，包括三部半自传的小说。

definitions: vt. 把…嵌入（或插入）；使深留脑中
embed.memory_aid: 联想记忆：em（里面）＋bed（床）→把…嵌入床中→把…嵌入
collocations: be embedded in 植根于
examples: Some companies embedded wireless modules into laptops, making it easier to work. 有些公司把无线模块嵌入笔记本电脑内，使工作更加便捷。

definitions: n./v. 拍卖
auction.memory_aid: 词根记忆：auc（提高）＋tion→提高价格→拍卖
examples: Auctions are another popular form of occasional trade. 拍卖是临时交易的另一种流行形式。

definitions: n. 反馈；反馈信息
feedback.memory_aid: 组合词：feed（喂养；提供）＋back（反）→反馈
collocations: information feedback 信息反馈
examples: I'm waiting for your feedback on the proposal I handed in last week. 我等着你对我上周提交的提案的反馈意见。

definitions: vt. 把…载入编年史 n. 编年史，年代记
chronicle.memory_aid: 词根记忆：chron（时间）＋ic＋le→按时间编排→编年史
examples: His achievements are chronicled in a new biography out this week. 他的成就已载入本周将出版的一本新传记。

definitions: a. 清醒的，未醉的；持重的，冷静的；（颜色）素净的 v.（使）清醒；（使）变得冷静
collocations: sober up （使）清醒
examples: On sober reflection, I don't think I really need a car after all. 冷静地想了一下，我觉得我其实并不需要车。

definitions: n.（文化或宗教习俗方面的）禁忌，忌讳；禁止，避讳 a. 忌讳的
taboo.memory_aid: 发音记忆：“特不”→特不准干的事→禁忌，忌讳
collocations: taboo word 禁忌词
examples: In every culture, there are topics that are taboos to talk about. 每种文化中都有一些不能谈论的禁忌话题。

definitions: v. 划分优先顺序；优先处理
prioritize.memory_aid: 来自priority（n. 优先事项；优先，重点）
examples: You should learn to prioritize your work when you are given several tasks at the same time. 当你在同一时间被分配了几项工作时，得学会划分优先顺序。

definitions: v. 革新，创新

definitions: n. 救济者；缓解物

definitions: n. 末端；极端，极度

definitions: n. 负荷（量），负担（＊ weight）；装载（量）vt. 装载，使负担（burden）

definitions: n. 繁荣，兴旺（flourish, blossom）

definitions: vt. 促进，推动（accelerate, incite）；提示；鼓励（encourage）a. 敏捷的；及时的，迅速的 n. 提词，提示
prompt.memory_aid: 词根记忆：pro（向前）＋mpt（＝empt 拿）→向前拿→促进，推动
examples: Bob's dislike for hot weather prompted him to move north. 鲍勃不喜欢炎热的天气，这促使他迁往北方。

definitions: n. 源，源泉；来源，出处（origin）；信息来源
A: Excuse me, does this library have anything on the international arts festival coming this summer or should I go to the art library for that?
B: If you give a minute, I think we have a few sources for that kind of information.
A：打扰一下，这个图书馆有关于今年夏天国际艺术节的信息吗？还是我该去艺术图书馆问问？
B：请稍等，我想我们有一些这方面的信息。
collocations: at source 在源头；从一开始；energy source 能源
examples: Historians use a wide range of primary and secondary sources for their research. 历史学家在研究中使用大量的原始资料和二手资料。//

definitions: vi. 竞选；参加战斗 n. 竞选活动；（政治或商业性）活动；战役
campaign.memory_aid: 联想记忆：camp（营地）＋aign→军队在野外扎营→参加战斗
examples: Mary shouldn't have campaigned against Steve. 玛丽本不该开展反对史蒂夫的运动。

definitions: a. 音乐的；悦耳的（melodious, tuneful）；有音乐天赋的，爱好音乐的 n. 音乐剧
examples: Ella is the perfect musical partner for her friend. 埃拉是她朋友的完美音乐搭档。

definitions: vt. 强调，着重（＊ stress）
emphasize.memory_aid: 词根记忆：em（表加强）＋phas（说）＋ize→强调，着重
examples: The story emphasized the courage of a man made him a hero. 这个故事强调了勇气能使一个人成为英雄。

definitions: v. 迎合；提供饮食
cater.memory_aid: 联想记忆：cat（猫）＋er→猫饿了，喂点猫粮→提供饮食
collocations: cater for 迎合；cater to 供应伙食
examples: Some websites are popular among some young people, because they cater to their low taste. 有些网站因为迎合了一些年轻人的低级趣味而大受欢迎。

definitions: v.（使）融合；熔接（mix, melt）；（使）熔化；因保险丝烧断而断电；合并（combine）n. 保险丝；引信；导火线
examples: The resulting mass was further heated to fuse the mass into what was called potash. 生成的物质被进一步加热，熔合成所谓的碳酸钾。

definitions: n. 共振，共鸣；回声，反响
resonance.memory_aid: 词根记忆：re（再，又）＋son（声音）＋ance→声音再次响起→共振，共鸣
examples: The musical tone of an electric guitar is created not by the resonance of the body of the guitar but electronical amplification. 电吉他的乐音不是靠吉他本身的共振产生的，而是靠电子扩音器。

definitions: vt. 包含（include）；牵涉，牵连；使参加
involve.memory_aid: 词根记忆：in（进入）＋volv（卷）＋e→卷入→牵涉，牵连
examples: Your main responsibilities will involve ensuring the safety of everyone who skis here. 你主要的责任将是确保所有在这里滑雪的人的安全。// I want to be involved from start to finish. 我想自始至终参与其中。

definitions: v. 酿造；冲泡；酝酿，行将发生 n. 冲泡（或酿造）的饮料；（尤指某地酿造的）啤酒
brew.memory_aid: 联想记忆：喝下自酿（brew）的苦酒，他紧皱起眉头（brow）
examples: This store provides good service including brewing tea for the waiting customers. 这家商店为顾客提供优质的服务，包括为等待的顾客沏茶。

definitions: vt. 浇铸（mold）；投掷（throw）；投射（光、视线等）；蜕（皮）n. 铸件；演员表，全体演员；投，抛
examples: They had invented bronze, an alloy that could be cast in molds, out of which they made tools and weapons. 他们已经发明了青铜，这种合金可以在模子里浇铸，做成工具和武器。

definitions: v. 投降；（被迫）放弃，交出 n. 投降；屈服，屈从；放弃
surrender.memory_aid: 联想记忆：sur（在…下面）＋render（递交）→把放在下面的东西交上去→投降；放弃
collocations: surrender (oneself) to sth. 听任（感情、习惯等）的摆布
examples: The murderer finally surrendered to the police. 凶犯最终向警方投降。

definitions: a. 最先的；最著名的，最重要的（＊ leading, chief）
foremost.memory_aid: 组合词：fore（前面）＋most（最）→站在最前面的→最先的；最著名的
examples: He is one of the foremost pianists of our day. 他是我们这个时代最著名的钢琴家之一。

definitions: v. 贮藏，囤积 n. 储藏（物），贮存（物）
hoard.memory_aid: 联想记忆：把东西藏（hoard）在木板（board）后
collocations: hoard up 囤积
examples: It is better to hoard money in the bank for tomorrow than spend it today. 我认为把钱存入银行以备将来之用比现在就把钱花掉要好。

definitions: a. 平行的；相似的（＊ similar）n. 相似处；纬线 vt. 与…平行；与…相似；比得上

definitions: n. 废弃物，垃圾（rubbish）；一窝幼崽 v. 乱扔；使凌乱

definitions: a. 潜在的（latent）；基础的（basal）

examples: An interviewer can go beyond written questions and probe for a subject's underlying feelings and reasons. 面试官可以不局限于书面问题，了解接受面试者潜在的情感和理智。

definitions: n. 符号，标志（sign）；象征
examples: The common meal served at a common hearth is a powerful symbol, a mark of social unity. 在公共壁炉旁共同就餐是社会团结的一个有力象征。

definitions: a. 无效的，无用的，无意义的；琐细的；（人）没出息的

definitions: n. 饮食，食物；规定饮食 vi. 节食

definitions: a. 有重大意义的，重要的，显著的（noteworthy, important）；意味深长的

A：汤姆昨晚讲的故事太逗了。他简直像换了个人。
B：没错，他平常很严肃的。
examples: It normally takes me half an hour to get there by bike. 我骑自行车去那儿一般要花半个小时。//

definitions: n. 财产，所有物（possession）；所有权（ownership）；房产，地产（real estate）；特性（characteristic）
property.memory_aid: 词根记忆：proper（固有的）＋ty（表物，名词后缀）→固有物→财产，所有物
examples: Silver's most distinguishing property is its electrical conductivity. 导电性是银最显著的特性。

definitions: a. 完全的，绝对的；地道的；无疑的，确凿的；不受限制的，不受约束的
absolute.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ab（表加强）＋solu（松开）＋te→完全松开→完全的
collocations: absolute zero 绝对零度；with absolute certainty 绝对肯定地
examples: Beauty cannot be measured by any absolute standard. 美没有绝对的衡量标准。

definitions: n. 开关，电闸；转换，改变；枝条，鞭子 v.（使）转变，改变（transform）；交换，掉换
collocations: switch off 切断；switch on 打开；switch to 转到，转变成
examples: I couldn't make myself switch off the TV. 让我关电视，我做不到。

definitions: a. 有才智的，聪明的（clever）
intelligent.memory_aid: 词根记忆：intel（在…之间）＋lig（选择）＋ent（形容词后缀）→能在很多事物中作出选择的→有才智的，聪明的
examples: He didn't realize how intelligent Mary really was. 他没有意识到玛丽有多聪明。

definitions: vi. 离开（leave, exit）；（from）背离（deviate）
depart.memory_aid: 词根记忆：de（去掉，离开）＋part（离开）→离开；背离
examples: Some musicians consciously depart from strict meter to create a relaxed sense of phrasing that also emphasizes the underlying rhythms. 一些音乐家有意摆脱严格的韵律，试图在强调基本旋律的同时创造一种松散的编排方式。

definitions: v. 扩张（outspread）；膨胀（swell）；伸展，伸开
expand.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ex（向外）＋pand（张开）→向外张开→扩张；膨胀
examples: The new university greatly expanded in size and course offerings, breaking completely out of the old. 那所新的大学在规模和课程选择上都有了大幅增加，完全摆脱了旧的模式。

definitions: n.（宗教的）仪式，典礼（ritual）
examples: In this area there are certain things one should not do in everyday life because they are linked to funeral rites. 在该地区，有些与丧葬仪式相关的事在日常生活中是不应该做的。

definitions: n. 全部课程（course）
examples: French is in the curriculum. 法语已纳入课程内容。

definitions: vt. 表明，显示（indicate, show）n. 货物清单 a. 明显的（apparent）

examples: The contradiction manifested itself in the employment situation. 这个矛盾在就业形势中显现了出来。

definitions: a. 对全局有重要意义的，关键的；战略性的（tactical）

definitions: n./v. 下降（descend）；衰退（decay）；拒绝，谢绝

examples: Her mother's health was declining rapidly. 她母亲的健康状况迅速恶化。

definitions: n. 美洲（或欧洲）野牛
bison.memory_aid: 发音记忆：“拜神”→印度人视牛为神物，美洲野牛去印度肯定也被当成神来拜→美洲野牛
collocations: a herd of bison 一群野牛
examples: Due to commercial hunting and slaughter in the 19th century, the bison nearly went extinct. 19世纪，北美野牛因商业捕猎和屠宰几近灭绝。

definitions: n. 主旨，要点，大意

examples: I cannot understand the gist of this complicated reading material. 我没能理解这篇复杂的阅读材料的主旨。

definitions: a. 假设的
hypothetical.memory_aid: 词根记忆：hypo（在…下面）＋thet（放）＋ical→放在下面的→假设的
examples: I must emphasize that this is only a hypothetical case. 我必须强调，这只是个假设的例子。

definitions: a. 作为例证的；用做说明的；解释性的
illustrative.memory_aid: 词根记忆：il（向内）＋lus（光）＋trative→向心灵投入光的→解释性的
examples: This example is illustrative of the issue we are discussing. 这个例子正好说明了我们正在讨论的问题。

definitions: a.（文章等）明白易懂的；明了的

examples: Such solutions were more manageable, more perspicuous, and can be applied. 这样的方法更易于掌握，也更明白，可被采用。

definitions: n. 面板，镶板；仪表盘；专门小组 vt. 镶板

examples: The walls were made of plaster or wood, sometimes elaborately paneled. 墙由灰泥或木板做成，有时镶嵌得很精美。

definitions: a. 有罪的，犯罪的；内疚的
examples: You are washing your car even on vacation. It makes me feel guilty. 你假期都洗车，这让我感到内疚。

definitions: vt. 破译（decode）
decipher.memory_aid: 联想记忆：de（去掉）＋cipher（密码）→解开密码→破译
examples: Ancient Egyptian hieroglyphic script was finally deciphered. 古埃及象形文字最终得到了破译。

definitions: vt. 起缓冲作用 n. 垫子（pillow）

collocations: air-cushion vehicle 气垫运载工具
examples: The carpet cushioned the fall of the vase. 地毯缓冲了花瓶的坠落。

definitions: n. 微生物
microorganism.memory_aid: 联想记忆：micro（微小的）＋organism（生物）→微生物
examples: Some types of microorganisms have adapted to the extreme conditions. 一些类型的微生物已适应了极其恶劣的环境。

definitions: a.（感到）不舒服的（unwell）；糟糕的（terrible）；可怕的（awesome）；非常的
examples: I feel awful. I think I'm coming down with that flu. 我感觉特难受，觉得自己得了流感。// The cafeteria food was awful. 自助餐厅的饭糟透了。

definitions: n. 外科手术；外科学；手术室，诊疗室

collocations: heart bypass surgery 心脏搭桥手术
examples: As a rule, doctors hold surgeries between 9 and 11:30 every day. 一般来说，医生每天9点到11点半做手术。

definitions: n. 影响（力）（effect）；冲击，撞击（collision）

collocations: impact on/upon 对…有影响
examples: How did the agricultural societies impact people's family relationships? 农业社会如何影响着人们的家庭关系？

definitions: n. 甲壳类动物 a. 甲壳类的

definitions: v. 获得（＊ acquire, procure）；通用，流行
obtain.memory_aid: 词根记忆：ob（表加强）＋tain（拿住）→用力拿住→获得

definitions: n. 回答者，响应者；调查对象；被告 a. 回答的
examples: Only 20% of the respondents agreed with the suggestion. 只有20％的调查对象同意这项建议。

definitions: n. 离婚；分离，脱离 v. 与…离婚；使分离，使脱离
divorce.memory_aid: 联想记忆：di（分开）＋vorce（看做voice，声音）→夫妻两个发出不同的声音→离婚
examples: Nearly half of British marriages are likely to end in divorce, according to the bleak picture painted by a new statistical study. 最近一项统计研究得出一个令人沮丧的结果，在英国，近一半的婚姻很可能会以离婚告终。

definitions: n. 种类（kind）；范畴
category.memory_aid: 词根记忆：cate（在…下面）＋gor（收集）＋y→在下面细细收集→种类
examples: The common broad leaf trees we have on campus fall into this category. 我们校园里常见的宽叶树均属于这个类别。

definitions: a. 比喻的，借喻的，象征的；形象的
examples: Before I go on to the biochemical specifics of how this works, let me provide a figurative example. 我先打一个比方，然后再具体解释这如何发生生化作用。

definitions: n. 肖像，画像（picture）；描写，描绘（depiction, description）
portrait.memory_aid: 词根记忆：por（向前）＋trait（拉）→向前拉以便进行描绘→肖像
collocations: portrait painting 肖像画
examples: The writer gave a portrait of life at the French courts. 那个作家详细描绘了法国宫廷的生活。

derivatives.pos_def: n. 画像，肖像；画像技法

definitions: n. 二氧化物
dioxide.memory_aid: 联想记忆：di（二）＋oxide（氧化物）→二氧化物
collocations: sulphur dioxide 二氧化硫
examples: Carbon dioxide is also generated as a by-product of combustion. 二氧化碳也是燃烧过程产生的一个副产品。

definitions: n. 甲醇
examples: The impurities are washed out with methanol, I think, before this gas is sent on to reactors where it's changed into oil. 我认为，该气体在被送往反应器转变为油之前，其杂质就已被甲醇清洗干净。

definitions: vt. 积聚（accumulate）
amass.memory_aid: 联想记忆：a＋mass（团）→变成一团→积聚
examples: The shellfish amass around the rocks in the shallow water. 贝类聚集在浅水区的岩石周围。

definitions: a. 可行的，行得通的（practicable, workable）
feasible.memory_aid: 词根记忆：feas（＝fac 做）＋ible（能…的）→能做的→可行的，行得通的
examples: It is not feasible to build sea defenses to protect against erosion. 修建海防避免侵蚀是行不通的。

definitions: a. 令人高兴的，愉快的（attractive, comfortable）
collocations: a pleasing performance 令人愉快的表演；pleasing to the eye 赏心悦目的
examples: The arrangement of the furniture and facilities formed a pleasing atmosphere in the mall. 家具和设备的布置为商场营造出一种愉快的氛围。

definitions: v. 评分（grade）；划；获胜，成功 n. 得分，分数（mark）；乐谱（＊ musical composition）；抓痕，划痕；二十
score.memory_aid: 联想记忆：分，分（score），考试的核心（core）
examples: The game was tied until John scored the winning point. 约翰得分赢得比赛，之前一直是平局。

definitions: ad. 简单地，简明地（clearly）；简直；仅仅，只（just）；朴素地，简朴地
examples: This vertical movement of the fieldstone is not simply an artifact of soil erosion. 卵石的垂直运动并非只是土壤侵蚀的结果。

definitions: a. 肥沃的，富饶的（rich）；能结果的，能繁殖的（productive）；想象力丰富的
fertile.memory_aid: 词根记忆：fer（带来）＋tile→可带来果实的→肥沃的；能结果的
examples: The soil near the forts is very fertile. 城堡附近的土壤非常肥沃。

definitions: n. 书法（calligraphy）
penmanship.memory_aid: 联想记忆：penman（书法家）＋ship（名词后缀）→书法
examples: Penmanship was often taught as a separate subject from the first grade. 书法通常从一年级开始就被作为一个独立的科目来教授。
